name: DoclingDocument unified representation
applicability: Tree-structured Pydantic document with body/furniture separation, reading order via children, JSON pointer references. T28 output schema design reference

name: Backend + Pipeline architecture
applicability: Clean separation: backends parse formats, pipelines orchestrate processing stages. T28 should separate source-specific extraction from cross-source orchestration

name: Plugin system via pluggy
applicability: Third-party OCR/layout/table models registered via setuptools entrypoints. T28 could use similar pattern for community-contributed extractors

name: Serializer hierarchy
applicability: BaseDocSerializer with per-component serializers. T28 export layer could follow same pattern — one serializer per output format

name: HybridChunker with contextualize()
applicability: chunk() returns chunks, contextualize() enriches with metadata for embedding. Relevant for T28 analysis-to-synthesis bridge

name: MCP server integration
applicability: docling-mcp as separate package. Claude Desktop + LM Studio configs. Agent framework examples (LlamaIndex, Pydantic AI, smolagents). Direct relevance — we already use MCP
home_connection: T28 MCP integration for extraction tools

name: VLM pipeline for document understanding
applicability: VlmPipeline for end-to-end VLM conversion. DocTags output. Local models via Transformers/MLX. T28 could delegate complex PDFs to VLM

name: ASR pipeline for audio/video
applicability: Whisper Turbo ASR → DoclingDocument. Same output format as PDF/DOCX. Auto-selects mlx-whisper on Apple Silicon. Directly relevant to T28 audio source type

name: Enrichment pipeline (code, formula, picture)
applicability: Toggleable post-processing enrichments. Code language detection, formula parsing, picture classification/description. Pattern for T28 optional analysis steps

name: 20+ framework integration docs
applicability: Each integration has dedicated docs page with code examples. Quantity of integrations is noteworthy but specific frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex) less relevant to T28's orchestration-first approach

name: Docling Technical Report (arXiv:2408.09869)
applicability: Academic paper detailing Docling architecture, layout models, table structure recognition. Research methodology reference

name: docling-core (types and schemas)
applicability: DoclingDocument Pydantic types, serializers, chunkers. The schema package. T28 could have similar core types package

name: docling-mcp (MCP server)
applicability: MCP server wrapping docling conversion. Agent framework examples. Direct integration reference
